full_text:
Wang Men 王門
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Men (王門). A military commander, he was forced into withdrawing after Tian Yu shamed him. Wang Men was affiliated with Gongsun Zan and Yuan Shao.
